title: Agency Tool Configuration
description: Schema for tool definitions consumed by convert.sh and install.sh. Each tool specifies its output format, install destination, and file naming conventions.

tools.description: Map of tool IDs to their configuration.

label.description: Human-readable tool name shown in install.sh output.

dest.description: Default install directory, relative to $HOME or absolute.

split_sections.description: Whether to split agent body into persona/operations files (openclaw).

minimal_frontmatter.description: Whether to strip color/emoji/vibe from frontmatter (qwen, codex).

single_file.description: Whether all agents are merged into one file (aider, windsurf).
